title: SQL injection in a TypeScript lookup

finding.title: User input is interpolated into an executed SQL query
finding.summary: The lookup builds SQL with user-controlled email input instead of a parameterized query.

title: Data race on a shared Go map

finding.title: Concurrent map access is not synchronized
finding.summary: Multiple goroutines read and write the same map without a mutex or another synchronization boundary.

title: Path traversal in a Python file handler

finding.title: Untrusted path escapes the intended directory
finding.summary: The requested filename is joined to the storage root without canonical containment validation.
